name: Media Downloader
description: Download and extract media from any platform (YouTube, Soundgasm, Vimeo, TikTok, Twitter, Instagram, etc.) with metadata extraction, format selection, and direct storage integration

tools.name: extract_media_info
tools.description: Extract metadata and format information from any video/audio URL (YouTube, Soundgasm, Vimeo, TikTok, Twitter, Instagram, etc.). Returns title, uploader, duration, available formats, quality options, file sizes, and direct download URLs without actually downloading the file.

url.description: URL of the video or audio to extract information from

format_type.description: Type of formats to return (audio-only, video, or all available formats)

include_formats.description: Include detailed format information (codecs, bitrates, resolutions)

tools.name: download_media
tools.description: Download video or audio from any supported platform and save directly to storage with public/private access. Supports quality selection, format conversion, automatic transcription, and preserves all source metadata. Works with YouTube, Soundgasm, Vimeo, TikTok, Twitter, Instagram, and 1000+ other sites.

url.description: URL of the video or audio to download

folder_id.description: Optional folder ID to organize the downloaded file

bucket_id.description: Optional storage bucket ID (uses default project bucket if not provided)

format_type.description: Type of media to download: 'audio' extracts audio only, 'video' downloads video with audio, 'best' selects highest quality available

quality.description: Quality setting: '1080p', '720p', '480p', '360p' for video OR '320', '256', '192', '128' (kbps) for audio bitrate

format_id.description: Specific format ID from extract-media-info (overrides quality setting for precise control)

file_name.description: Custom filename (automatically uses video title if not provided)

access_level.description: File access level: 'public' generates public URL, 'private' requires authentication

auto_transcribe.description: Automatically transcribe audio content (audio files only)

tags.description: Tags for file organization and search
